name: Barbell Bench Press
description: Lie on a flat bench, grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder width, lower it to your chest, and press it back up.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
description: Lie on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, lower them to chest level, and press them up.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
description: Lie on an incline bench, lower the barbell to your upper chest, and press up.

name: Incline Dumbbell Bench Press
description: Lie on an incline bench, lower the dumbbells to upper chest level, and press up.

name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
description: Lie on a decline bench, lower the barbell to lower chest level, and press up.

name: Dumbbell Flyes
description: Lie on a flat bench, start with weights above chest, lower them out to the sides with a slight elbow bend, and bring them back together.

name: Cable Crossover
description: Stand between pulley machines, pull cables forward and down in a wide sweeping motion.

name: Push-ups
description: Standard push-ups on the floor keeping core tight and body straight.

name: Chest Dips
description: Perform dips on parallel bars, leaning forward slightly to target the chest.

name: Machine Chest Press
description: Sit in chest press machine, press handles forward until arms are extended.

name: Pec Deck Fly
description: Sit at pec deck machine, bring pads/handles together in front of chest.

name: Smith Machine Bench Press
description: Bench press utilizing the guided path of a Smith Machine.

name: Incline Smith Machine Press
description: Incline bench press utilizing the guided path of a Smith Machine.

name: Deadlift
description: Lift a loaded barbell off the ground to hip level, keeping back flat and core engaged.

name: Barbell Row
description: Hinge forward at the hips, pull the barbell to your lower chest/abdomen.

name: Dumbbell Row
description: Support one knee and hand on a bench, pull a dumbbell up to your hip level.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Sit at a pulldown machine, pull the bar down to your upper chest.

name: Pull-ups
description: Grip a overhead bar with palms facing away, pull chest up to the bar.

name: Chin-ups
description: Grip a overhead bar with palms facing towards you, pull chest to the bar.

name: T-Bar Row
description: Pull the T-Bar handle towards your chest while keeping your back straight.

name: Seated Cable Row
description: Pull the cable attachment towards your lower abdomen while sitting upright.

name: Face Pull
description: Pull cable towards your face/ears, flaring your elbows and squeezing rear delts.

name: Hyperextensions
description: Lie face down on a hyperextension bench, bend at waist, and raise torso up.

name: Straight Arm Pulldown
description: Stand facing cable, pull bar down to thighs keeping arms straight.

name: Single Arm Lat Pulldown
description: Perform lat pulldowns one arm at a time for focused isolation.

name: Barbell Shrugs
description: Hold barbell in front, shrug shoulders upward toward ears without bending elbows.

name: Dumbbell Shrugs
description: Hold dumbbells at sides, shrug shoulders upward toward ears.

name: Barbell Back Squat
description: Place barbell on upper back, squat down until thighs are parallel to ground, and stand up.

name: Barbell Front Squat
description: Rest barbell on front shoulders, squat down keeping torso upright, and stand up.

name: Leg Press
description: Sit in machine, place feet on platform, and press the weight away by extending legs.

name: Hack Squat
description: Use a hack squat machine to perform guided squats targeting the quadriceps.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
description: Place one foot behind you on a bench, hold dumbbells, and squat down on front leg.

name: Leg Extensions
description: Sit in machine, extend legs forward and upward to contract the quads.

name: Goblet Squat
description: Hold a single dumbbell vertically at chest level, and squat deep.

name: Dumbbell Lunges
description: Step forward with one leg, lower hips until back knee is near ground, and push back up.

name: Walking Lunges
description: Perform lunges continuously stepping forward across a distance.

name: Box Squat
description: Squat down onto a box or bench, pause briefly, and explode upward.

name: Romanian Deadlift (Barbell)
description: Hold barbell, hinge at hips lowering weight along shins keeping back flat, and squeeze glutes/hams to stand.

name: Romanian Deadlift (Dumbbell)
description: Hinge at hips holding dumbbells, lowering them along shins, and stand up.

name: Lying Leg Curl
description: Lie face down on machine, curl pad towards glutes by bending knees.

name: Seated Leg Curl
description: Sit in leg curl machine, pull pad down and back towards seat.

name: Glute-Ham Raise
description: Secure ankles in GHR bench, lower torso forward, and raise back up using hamstrings.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
description: Kneeling on floor with ankles anchored, lower body forward under control and push back up.

name: Good Mornings
description: Barbell on back, hinge at hips keeping legs relatively straight, and return to upright.

name: Barbell Overhead Press
description: Press a barbell from upper chest level straight up overhead.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
description: Sit or stand, press dumbbells from shoulder level straight up overhead.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
description: Raise dumbbells out to your sides until arms are parallel to the floor.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
description: Raise cable across body out to the side to target lateral deltoids.

name: Dumbbell Front Raise
description: Raise dumbbells forward to shoulder level in front of you.

name: Dumbbell Rear Delt Fly
description: Bent over at waist, raise dumbbells out to sides, focusing on rear shoulders.

name: Rear Delt Pec Deck Fly
description: Sit facing machine pad, fly handles backwards to target rear delts.

name: Arnold Press
description: Press dumbbells overhead while rotating palms from facing you to facing forward.

name: Upright Row
description: Pull barbell vertically up to chest level, keeping bar close to body.

name: Push Press
description: Overhead press using a slight leg dip and drive to assist the lift.

name: Smith Machine Shoulder Press
description: Shoulder press using the guided vertical movement of a Smith Machine.

name: Barbell Curl
description: Stand and curl a barbell up towards shoulders, squeezing biceps.

name: Dumbbell Curl
description: Curl dumbbells, rotating palms upward (supinating) at the top.

name: Hammer Curl
description: Curl dumbbells keeping palms facing each other (neutral grip).

name: Barbell Preacher Curl
description: Curl barbell resting upper arms on preacher bench pad.

name: Dumbbell Preacher Curl
description: Curl dumbbell resting one arm at a time on preacher bench pad.

name: Concentration Curl
description: Sit on bench, rest elbow against inner thigh, curl dumbbell upward.

name: Cable Bicep Curl
description: Curl cable attachment towards shoulders while standing.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
description: Sit on incline bench, curl dumbbells from hanging position.

name: Spider Curl
description: Lie face down on incline bench, curl barbell up from hanging position.

name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
description: Push cable bar/rope down by extending elbows fully.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Tricep Extension
description: Hold dumbbell overhead with both hands, lower behind head, and extend arms.

name: Skull Crushers
description: Lie on bench, lower barbell/EZ-bar to forehead, and extend elbows.

name: Close Grip Bench Press
description: Bench press with a narrow grip to emphasize the triceps.

name: Triceps Dips
description: Perform dips on parallel bars, keeping torso upright to target triceps.

name: Cable Overhead Tricep Extension
description: Face away from cable, hold rope overhead, and extend arms forward/up.

name: Diamond Push-ups
description: Push-ups with hands close together forming a diamond shape under chest.

name: Dumbbell Kickback
description: Hinge forward, raise upper arm parallel to torso, extend elbow back.

name: Bench Dips
description: Place hands on bench behind you, feet on floor/another bench, lower and lift hips.

name: Ab Crunch
description: Lie on back, curl head/shoulders up off floor, contracting abs.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: Hang from bar, raise legs to parallel or higher keeping them straight.

name: Plank
description: Hold forearm plank position keeping body completely straight and core tight.

name: Decline Crunch
description: Crunch on a decline bench to increase resistance.

name: Russian Twist
description: Sit with knees bent, lean back slightly, rotate torso side to side.

name: Cable Crunch
description: Kneel facing cable machine, hold rope behind neck, crunch torso down.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
description: Kneel, roll ab wheel forward as far as possible keeping back flat, and pull back.

name: Lying Leg Raise
description: Lie on back, raise legs to vertical, lower them slowly without touching floor.

name: Side Plank
description: Hold side plank on one elbow, maintaining straight body line.

name: Mountain Climbers
description: In pushup position, drive knees to chest alternately in rapid motion.

name: Standing Calf Raise
description: Place shoulders under pads, raise heels off platform by extending ankles.

name: Seated Calf Raise
description: Sit, place pad on knees, raise heels by extending ankles.

name: Calf Press on Leg Press
description: Place toes on bottom of leg press plate, push platform by flexing ankles.

name: Donkey Calf Raise
description: Bend forward at hips, place weight/partner on lower back, raise heels.

name: Clean and Jerk
description: Lift barbell from floor to shoulders (clean), then drive it overhead (jerk).

name: Snatch
description: Lift barbell from floor to overhead in one single explosive movement.

name: Kettlebell Swing
description: Swing a kettlebell (or dumbbell) between legs and up to eye level using hips.

name: Thruster
description: Perform a front squat, then press the barbell overhead in one fluid motion.

name: Burpee
description: Drop to push-up, jump back to feet, and jump straight up in the air.

name: Farmer's Walk
description: Hold heavy dumbbells or plates in hands, walk a set distance.

name: Wall Ball
description: Squat and throw medicine ball up against target wall, catching it on return.

name: Cable Bicep Curl (Behind Back)
description: Stand facing away from low pulley, curl handle forward keeping elbow back.

name: Jefferson Squat
description: Stand straddling a barbell, squat down, grip the bar, and lift by standing.

name: Zottman Curl
description: Dumbbell curl up with palms up, rotate palms down at top, lower down palms down.

name: Cable Kickbacks (Glute)
description: Attach ankle cuff, kick leg backward squeezing glutes/hamstrings.

name: Svend Press
description: Pinch two plates or a dumbbell between palms, press them forward away from chest.

name: Deficit Deadlift
description: Deadlift standing on a raised platform (1-3 inches) to increase range of motion.

name: Step-ups
description: Hold dumbbells, step up onto a box or bench, and step down.

name: Plank Shoulder Taps
description: Hold plank, tap opposite shoulder with hand alternating sides.

name: Woodchopper (Cable)
description: Pull cable diagonally across body from high to low, rotating torso.

name: Hip Thrust (Barbell)
description: Sit on floor, back against bench, place barbell on hips, raise hips to parallel.
